---
title: Affiliations
---

## Current Affiliations

- Assistant Research Professor | Univeristy of Notre Dame
- Adjunct Professor | University of Nebraska-Lincoln

## Previous Appointments

- Research Assistant Professor | University of Nebraska-Lincoln | 2024-2025
- Research Associate | Duke University | 2022-2024

## Education

- Postdoctoral Fellow | Florida International University | 2020-2022
- Ph.D. Psychology - Cognitive Neuroscience | Brigham Young University | 2016-2020
- M.Sc. Neuroscience | Brigham Young University | 2014-2016
- B.Sc. Psychology | Brigham Young University-Idaho | 2008-2013
